instructions.instruction: Update objects and arrays by producing new copies rather than mutating in place
instructions.relevant_when: Changing a field or element of shared data

instructions.instruction: Use immutable/frozen structures where the language provides them
instructions.relevant_when: Modelling values that must not change

instructions.instruction: Prefer structural sharing over deep copies for large data
instructions.relevant_when: Updating a small part of a large structure
A function receives an object or collection
